sentences.target: Ich will meinen Konsum von Zucker reduzieren.
sentences.reading: /ɪç vɪl ˈmaɪ̯nən kɔnˈzuːm fɔn ˈtsʊkɐ ʁeduˈtsiːʁən./

translations.de: Ich will meinen Konsum von Zucker reduzieren.
translations.ipa: /ɪç vɪl ˈmaɪ̯nən kɔnˈzuːm fɔn ˈtsʊkɐ ʁeduˈtsiːʁən./
translations.en: I want to reduce my sugar consumption.
translations.fr: Je veux manger moins de sucre.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn ăn ít đường hơn.
translations.hi: मैं कम चीनी खाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.ro: Vreau să mănânc mai puțin zahăr.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative (1sg), selecting the infinitive 'reduzieren'.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, accusative masculine singular, modifying 'Konsum'.
Masculine noun; direct object of 'reduzieren'.
Preposition taking dative; introduces a 'of'-relation complement ('Zucker') to 'Konsum'.
Masculine noun, dative after 'von'; acts as a genitival attribute to 'Konsum'.
Main verb in infinitive, complement of the modal 'will'.

sentences.target: Im Büro steigt mein Konsum von Kaffee.
sentences.reading: /ɪm byˈʁoː ʃtaɪ̯kt maɪ̯n kɔnˈzuːm fɔn kaˈfeː./

translations.de: Im Büro steigt mein Konsum von Kaffee.
translations.ipa: /ɪm byˈʁoː ʃtaɪ̯kt maɪ̯n kɔnˈzuːm fɔn kaˈfeː./
translations.en: At the office, my coffee consumption increases.
translations.es: En la oficina tomo más café.
translations.fr: Au bureau, je bois plus de café.
translations.zh-Hans: 在办公室我喝更多咖啡。
translations.yue: 喺公司我會飲多啲咖啡。
translations.ru: В офисе я пью больше кофе.
translations.vi: Ở văn phòng tôi uống nhiều cà phê hơn.
translations.ar: في المكتب أشرب المزيد من القهوة.
translations.nl: Op kantoor drink ik meer koffie.
translations.uk: В офісі я п’ю більше кави.
translations.hi: ऑफिस में मैं ज्यादा कॉफी पीता हूँ.
translations.nb: På kontoret drikker jeg mer kaffe.
translations.id: Di kantor saya minum lebih banyak kopi.
translations.sv: På jobbet dricker jag mer kaffe.
translations.ro: La birou beau mai multă cafea.
translations.da: På kontoret drikker jeg mere kaffe.
translations.ja: オフィスではコーヒーをたくさん飲みます。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; fused preposition+definite article marking locative dative.
Neuter noun, dative object of 'Im' indicating location.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; intransitive, takes 'mein Konsum' as subject.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, nominative masculine singular, modifying 'Konsum'.
Masculine noun; subject of 'steigt'.
Preposition taking dative; introduces the complement 'Kaffee' to 'Konsum'.
Masculine noun, dative after 'von'; specifies the type of consumption.

sentences.target: Sein Konsum von Serien ist wirklich hoch.
sentences.reading: /zaɪ̯n kɔnˈzuːm fɔn ˈzeːʁi̯ən ɪst ˈvɪʁklɪç hoːx./

translations.de: Sein Konsum von Serien ist wirklich hoch.
translations.ipa: /zaɪ̯n kɔnˈzuːm fɔn ˈzeːʁi̯ən ɪst ˈvɪʁklɪç hoːx./
translations.en: His consumption of shows is really high.
translations.vi: Anh ấy xem rất nhiều phim bộ.
translations.hi: वह बहुत सारी सीरीज़ देखता है.
translations.sv: Han tittar på väldigt många serier.
translations.ro: El se uită la foarte multe seriale.
translations.ja: 彼はドラマをたくさん見ています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular, nominative masculine singular, modifying 'Konsum'.
Masculine noun; subject of the copular clause.
Preposition taking dative; introduces the complement 'Serien' to 'Konsum'.
Plural noun, dative after 'von'; specifies the consumed medium.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links subject to predicate adjective.
Adverb of degree, modifying the predicate adjective 'hoch'.
Predicate adjective; complements the copula 'ist'.

sentences.target: Ich achte auf meinen Konsum beim Einkaufen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈaxtə aʊ̯f ˈmaɪ̯nən kɔnˈzuːm baɪ̯m ˈaɪ̯nkaʊ̯fn̩./

translations.de: Ich achte auf meinen Konsum beim Einkaufen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈaxtə aʊ̯f ˈmaɪ̯nən kɔnˈzuːm baɪ̯m ˈaɪ̯nkaʊ̯fn̩./
translations.en: I pay attention to my consumption when shopping.
translations.es: Cuando voy de compras, me fijo en lo que compro.
translations.fr: Quand je fais les courses, je fais attention à ce que j’achète.
translations.it: Quando faccio la spesa, sto attento a quello che compro.
translations.ko: 장 볼 때 무엇을 사는지 신경 써요.
translations.zh-Hans: 购物时我会注意自己买什么。
translations.yue: 買嘢嗰陣我會留意自己買咩。
translations.ru: В магазине я обращаю внимание на то, что покупаю.
translations.pt: Quando faço compras, fico atento ao que compro.
translations.he: כשאני קונה, אני שם לב למה שאני קונה.
translations.vi: Khi đi mua sắm, tôi chú ý đến những gì mình mua.
translations.nl: Bij het boodschappen doen let ik op wat ik koop.
translations.uk: Під час покупок я стежу за тим, що купую.
translations.hi: खरीदारी करते समय मैं ध्यान देता हूँ कि क्या खरीद रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Podczas zakupów zwracam uwagę na to, co kupuję.
translations.nb: Når jeg handler, passer jeg på hva jeg kjøper.
translations.id: Saat berbelanja, saya memperhatikan apa yang saya beli.
translations.sv: När jag handlar är jag nogा med vad jag köper.
translations.ro: Când merg la cumpărături, sunt atent la ce cumpăr.
translations.cs: Při nakupování dávám pozor na to, co kupuji.
translations.da: Når jeg handler, er jeg opmærksom på, hvad jeg køber.
translations.fi: Ostoksilla kiinnitän huomiota siihen, mitä ostan.
translations.ja: 買い物をするときは、何を買うか気をつけています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, 1st person singular present; governs the prepositional complement 'auf ...'.
Preposition taking accusative in the verb phrase 'auf etwas achten'.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, accusative masculine singular, modifying 'Konsum'.
Masculine noun; object of the preposition 'auf' within the verb phrase.
Contraction of 'bei dem'; fused preposition+definite article marking dative context.
Nominalized infinitive; dative complement of 'beim' indicating the occasion.
